CITY OF CAMBRIDGE

 

CITY COUNCIL

FINAL ACTIONS ● JANUARY 27, 2026

 

 

 

Regular Meeting

Sullivan Chamber

Cambridge City Hall, 795 Massachusetts Ave, Cambridge, MA 02139

Published January 29, 2026

9:00 AM

 

ROLL CALL

 

Present:

Councillor Ayah A. Al-Zubi, REMOTE
Vice Mayor Burhan Azeem, IN PERSON – 9:25 AM
Councillor Timothy R. Flaherty, IN PERSON – 9:27 AM
Councillor Marc Mcgovern, IN PERSON
Councillor Patricia Nolan, IN PERSON
Councillor E. Denise Simmons, IN PERSON
Councillor Jivan Sobrinho-Wheeler, IN PERSON
Councillor Catherine Zusy, IN PERSON
Mayor Sumbul Siddiqui IN PERSON

 

 

Absent:

None

 

 

Staff Present:

None

Special Meeting of the City Council on Tuesday, January 27, 2026, at 9:00 am in the Sullivan Chamber, Cambridge City Hall, 795 Massachusetts Ave. Cambridge MA. to discuss Goal Setting for the
2026-2027 council term and City Council / City Staff work process.
 

I.

PLEDGE OF ALLEGIANCE

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

AGENDA

     Open Meeting Agenda re Goals for 2026 2027

 

 

Time

Activity

Facilitator(s)

 

9:00 -9:05

Welcome and desired outcomes for the session

City Manager and

Mayor

9:05 – 9:30

Public Comment

Mayor

9:30 – 11:00

In a large group, discuss

  1. Which of these 2024/2025 goals have been achieved and therefore should come off the list for 2026/2027?
  2. Which of these 2024/2025 goals need to be modiﬁed to reﬂect progress made, but not completion?
  3. Which of these 2024/2025 goals are no longer relevant?
  4. What goals should be added for 2026/2027 if any?
  5. Review and agree on 3 – 5 goals for

2026/2027

Facilitator

11:00 – 11:15

Break

 

11:15 – 12:45

Council and City Staff discuss what’s working well and what needs to be adjusted/improved?

Yi An to o􀆯er updates and status on the below 3

topics followed by conversation with the full

group:
 

         1. Policy Orders/Awaiting Reports

         2. Use of Committees

         3. Constituent Services

City Manager/Facilitator

12:45 – 1:00

Closing

City Manager and

Mayor
